recommendations.title: 10 Years
recommendations.overview: A group of friends reunite ten years after their high-school graduation.

recommendations.title: The Under-Gifted
recommendations.overview: The story centers around a graduating class of "less-gifted" students in a private Versailles high school. Only a miracle has brought the students this far along, and after a practical joke misfires and the whole school is dynamited, the students are

recommendations.title: 18 Year Old Virgin
recommendations.overview: In a series of sexual mishaps, a high school senior tries to lose her virginity on the last night before graduation.

recommendations.title: Compagni di scuola
recommendations.overview: A group of former high school classmates meets for a reunion 15 years after graduation, only to discover that any innocence or friendship is long lost.

recommendations.title: The Final
recommendations.overview: A group of high school outcasts get revenge on the students that torment them.

recommendations.title: Mac & Devin Go to High School
recommendations.overview: A comedy that follows two high school students -- one overachiever struggling to write his valedictorian speech, the other a senior now going on his 15th year of school.

recommendations.title: Detachment
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of three weeks in the lives of several high school teachers, administrators and students through the eyes of substitute teacher, Henry Barthes. Henry roams from school to school, imparting modes of knowledge, but never staying long enough

recommendations.title: 3 Idiotas
recommendations.overview: A group of friends embark on an adventure to find a classmate from university who disappeared without a trace on graduation day.

recommendations.title: Booksmart
recommendations.overview: Two academic teenage superstars realize, on the eve of their high school graduation, that they should have worked less and played more. Determined to never fall short of their peers, the girls set out on a mission to cram four years of fun into one n

recommendations.title: Porky's Revenge
recommendations.overview: As graduation nears for the class of 1955 at Angel Beach High, the gang once again faces off against their old enemy, Porky, who wants them to throw the school's championship basketball game since he has bet on the opposing team.
